basic_details.job_title: NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand (NIT Uttarakhand) Placement Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website nituk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation and MBA from a recognized university, Experience in career counselling & placement activities in government or private or organizations or PSUs
qualification.details: Placement Officer (On Contract): Graduation and MBA from a recognized university (Preference will be given to those candidates having an engineering degree at UG level). Experience in career counselling & placement activities in government or private organizations or PSUs. Desirable: Good communication skills (verbal and written), Good noting and drafting skills, Knowledge of Microsoft office, Email communication, latest technologies and social media platforms, Experience in liaisoning with companies/organizations and institutions; experience in event/seminar management.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Uttarakhand Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Placement Officer (On Contract): Graduation and MBA from a recognized university (Preference will be given to those candidates having an engineering degree at UG level). Experience in career counselling & placement activities in government or private organizations or PSUs. Desirable: Good communication skills (verbal and written), Good noting and drafting skills, Knowledge of Microsoft office, Email communication, latest technologies and social media platforms, Experience in liaisoning with companies/organizations and institutions; experience in event/seminar management.

rows.event: Last Date for Application Submission via Email

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Uttarakhand Placement Officer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Placement Officer post at NIT Uttarakhand is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Placement Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation and MBA from a recognized university. Preference will be given to those with an engineering degree at the undergraduate level.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Placement Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Placement Officer position is 55 years. There are no specific minimum age requirements mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Placement Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Placement Officer position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Placement Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Placement Officer position at NIT Uttarakhand will be based on a Walk-In Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the post of Placement Officer at NIT Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Placement Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Placement Officer (On Contract) at the National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is required for the Placement Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have experience in career counselling and placement activities in government, private organizations, or PSUs.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Uttarakhand located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand is located in Srinagar, Uttarakhand.
